name: Selaginella Tamariscina
summary: Minimum source-backed intake for ginkgetin and 5-lipoxygenase inhibition cluster completion.
description: Minimum source-backed intake for ginkgetin and 5-lipoxygenase inhibition cluster completion.
contraindications: pregnancy because Selaginella tamariscina Juan Bai is classified among contraindicated herbs for pregnancy in traditional Chinese medicine texts
warfarin or other CYP2C9-metabolized anticoagulant medication because its selaginellin compounds show inhibitory activity against CYP2C9 in human liver microsomes
medication metabolized by CYP2C8 or CYP2J2 because selaginellin and selaginellin M show high inhibitory potential against these enzymes in human liver microsome studies
known allergy to Selaginellaceae family plants because Selaginella tamariscina is a spikemoss species

sources.title: Selaginella tamariscina Ethanol Extract Attenuates Influenza A Virus Infection by Inhibiting Hemagglutinin and Neuraminidase
Amentoflavone from Selaginella tamariscina inhibits SARS-CoV-2 RNA-dependent RNA polymerase

Inhibitory Effect of Selaginellins from Selaginella tamariscina (Beauv.) Spring against Cytochrome P450 and Uridine 5'-Diphosphoglucuronosyltransferase Isoforms on Human Liver Microsomes
